    Request Samples

    Our ProcessFrom Harvest to Export, Handled with Precision

    Every step in our process is designed to preserve and enhance the exceptional quality that makes Kenyan coffee world-renowned.

    Our Export Process Journey

    Follow the complete journey from farm partnerships to global delivery

    Step 01

    Sourcing & Partnerships

    Building direct relationships with farmers and cooperatives

    Key Activities:

    • Partner with 50+ cooperatives and estates across Kenya
    • Direct farmer relationships ensuring fair pricing
    • Regular field visits and quality assessments
    • Support for sustainable farming practices
    • Pre-financing and harvest planning
    Timeline: Year-round relationship building
    Step 02

    Processing & Quality Control

    From cherry to green bean with meticulous quality standards

    Key Activities:

    • Washed processing for 85% of our coffees
    • Natural and honey processing for specialty lots
    • Moisture content monitoring (10-12% target)
    • Screen size grading and density sorting
    • Professional cupping by licensed Q Graders
    Timeline: 2-4 weeks post-harvest
    Step 03

    Storage & Lot Preparation

    Proper storage and preparation for export

    Key Activities:

    • Climate-controlled warehouse storage
    • GrainPro barrier bags for moisture protection
    • Jute bag packaging with lot identification
    • Final quality control and sample preparation
    • Inventory management and lot tracking
    Timeline: 1-2 weeks preparation
    Step 04

    Export Documentation

    Complete certification and export compliance

    Key Activities:

    • Phytosanitary certificates from KEPHIS
    • Certificate of Origin from Kenya Coffee Board
    • ICO (International Coffee Organization) permits
    • Commercial invoices and packing lists
    • Bill of lading and shipping instructions
    Timeline: 3-5 business days
    Step 05

    Logistics & Shipping

    Reliable shipping from Port of Mombasa worldwide

    Key Activities:

    • Secure transportation to Port of Mombasa
    • Container loading and stuffing supervision
    • Shipping coordination with global partners
    • Real-time tracking and updates
    • Insurance coverage for all shipments
    Timeline: 2-4 weeks transit time

    Quality Assurance Standards

    Rigorous quality control at every stage ensures consistency and excellence

    Professional Cupping

    Every lot cupped by licensed Q Graders using SCAA protocols

    85+ Cup Score Minimum

    Moisture Content

    Precise moisture control for optimal storage and shipping

    10-12% Moisture Range

    Grade Classification

    Accurate screen size grading and defect analysis

    AA/AB/PB Standards

    Traceability

    Complete chain of custody from farm to export

    100% Lot Traceability

    Complete Traceability Assurance

    Every bag of coffee carries a unique lot code that links it back to its origin farm, processing details, and quality metrics. This ensures complete transparency and accountability throughout the supply chain.

    Lot Identification

    Unique codes for every lot linking to origin farm and processing details

    Chain of Custody

    Documented handling at every stage from farm to export

    Export Documentation

    Complete certificates and permits for international compliance

    100% Traceable

    Every bag tracked from farm to port

    Custom Orders & Special Requests

    We work closely with roasters to fulfill specific requirements, from processing methods to packaging and shipping schedules. Our flexibility and expertise ensure you get exactly what you need for your customers.

    Custom Services Available:

    • Custom processing requests (natural, honey, experimental)
    • Harvest reservations and pre-orders
    • Sample roasting and cup profile development
    • Private lot sourcing from specific farms
    • Packaging customization and branding
    • Storage and shipping schedule coordination
    Request Custom Sample

    Experience Our Process Firsthand

    Ready to see how our meticulous process translates into exceptional coffee? Request samples and experience the difference quality makes.
